description_long: This is a marble funerary sculpture depicting a recumbent human figure lying atop an ornate sarcophagus. The figure is draped in flowing robes and rests on one side, with the head propped up by an arm, suggesting a peaceful repose. The sarcophagus features decorative reliefs and inscriptions on its sides, and the entire monument is set on a multi-tiered stone base. The craftsmanship highlights fine details in the folds of the garment and the serene facial expression of the figure. The base appears to be made of a different, slightly darker stone, contrasting with the white marble of the sculpture. The monument is likely intended as a memorial or grave marker, commonly found in historical or religious urban settings.
description: A detailed marble funerary sculpture of a reclining human figure atop an ornate sarcophagus, set on a multi-tiered stone base with inscriptions and decorative reliefs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the head and upper body of the reclining figure, with the sarcophagus' decorative reliefs and inscription panel clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the recumbent figure, the draped robes, and the detailed side panel of the sarcophagus.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the figure and the opposite end of the sarcophagus, with less detail visible on the figure's face.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the figure's back and the side panel of the sarcophagus, with inscriptions and reliefs visible.
attribute_subject_matter: reclining human figure on a funerary sarcophagus
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is installed on a stone floor, likely within an indoor historical or religious building such as a church or mausoleum.
